name: u1-fast-prime-tower
description: Fast prime/wipe tower aligned with the U1-safe 'Fastest Print' strategy: square 60mm tower, rectangle wall, small 2mm brim, low purge. Tower speed capped at the U1-safe 90 mm/s and sparse layers NOT skipped (no auto collision risk). Reversible; applied only in optimize mode when explicitly named. See docs/research/U1_PRINT_PROFILE_RESEARCH.md.
